name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Atbroker Registry Change
notes:
This Building Block detects creation/modification of Assistive Technology applications and persistence with usage of 'at'.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Mateusz Wydra, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Atbroker Registry Change
SIGMA Description: Detects creation/modification of Assistive Technology applications and persistence with usage of 'at'


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Atbroker Registry Change on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

when the event matches (LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\ats%' or LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\configuration%') or (LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\ats%' or LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\configuration%') AQL filter query
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of atbroker.exe

when the event matches (((LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\configuration%' and "target details"='(empty)') or (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\installer\msi%' and LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\ats%'))) or (((LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\configuration%' and "registry value data"='(empty)') or (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\installer\msi%' and LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\ats%'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Atbroker Registry Change on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\ats%' or LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\configuration%') or (LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\ats%' or LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\configuration%') AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of atbroker.exe

AND NOT when the event matches (((LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\configuration%' and "target details"='(empty)') or (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\installer\msi%' and LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\ats%'))) or (((LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\configuration%' and "registry value data"='(empty)') or (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\installer\msi%' and LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\ats%'))) AQL filter query
